title: Brine-Dry Moroccan Potato Khlea
description: A citrusy, springy Moroccan brunch dish featuring brine-dried potatoes, served with a raclette grill.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and slice them into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, combine lemon juice, orange juice, and 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Add the sliced potatoes and mix well to coat.
Let the potatoes marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Preheat a raclette grill to medium-high heat.
Remove the potatoes from the marinade, allowing any excess to drip off.
Season the potatoes with salt, black pepper, garlic, and a pinch of cumin, coriander, and paprika.
Place the potatoes on the preheated raclette grill and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Transfer the potatoes to a serving platter and garnish with fresh cilantro and a drizzle of honey.
Serve immediately, with additional lemon wedges on the side if desired.
